name: Vanilla Ice
description:
Vanilla Ice is the last Vampire created by DIO and one of the penultimate Stand Users the Joestar Group faces upon infiltrating DIO's Mansion. After the group is split up, he is sent to take out the team consisting of Avdol, Polnareff, and Iggy. Vanilla Ice is a Stand User controlling his void-based Stand ability, Cream, to battle.

His name is based off the famous ''rapper'', Vanilla Ice. His stand is named after the band, Cream.
